## Checklist

- [ ] `bash tests/run.sh` is green
- [ ] The CI-equivalent shellcheck batch is clean (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Portable: identical behavior on macOS (BSD) and Ubuntu (GNU) per CONVENTIONS.md
- [ ] No new dependencies
- [ ] Charter changes (if any) were made in `manifest/sections/` and `bin/albion-compile` was re-run
- [ ] Tests assert invariants, not hardcoded constants, where output is derived
